summary: This proposal standardizes a method for adding plugins and composable logic to smart contract accounts built on existing interfaces like [ERC-4337](eip-4337.md) (e.g., ERC-4337's `IAccount`). Specifically, by formalizing how applications can use the ERC-4337 Entry Point `NonceManager` and the emission of the `IEntryPoint` `UserOperationEvent` to account for plugin interactions, as well, as how to extract designated validators (in this case, by means of `IAccount`'s `validateUserOp`), accounts can specify how they call plugin contracts and grant special executory access for more advanced operations. Furthermore, this minimalist plugin approach is developer-friendly and complimentary to existing account abstraction standards by not requiring any additional functions for contracts that follow
title: Modular Accounts with Delegated Validation
